title: Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar''' was a group of unidentified individuals that terrorized travelers in the [[Desert/Legends|deserts]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]]. Research showed that their name most likely derived from the mythic fearless [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] [[Grk'kkrs'ar]]. It is not known whether the members of this group were actual Sand People or not.<ref name="SWG">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||The Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar}}</ref>

Concerned Tatooine citizens promised a reward for eliminating this threat.<ref name="SWG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar was mentioned in the description of a mission called "The Clan of Grk'kkrs'ar", that was available to players of [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']] at mission terminals on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWG" />
